summary: Verified the newly-added cart/checkout icon (data-testid=nav-checkout-icon) in BackHeader across all requested public sub-pages. Icon renders correctly, is visible, clickable, links to /registrera-fagel, and is correctly hidden on /registrera-fagel itself. Back-header-label remains visible alongside the icon on all BackHeader pages. Homepage (PublicHeader) icon behaviour is unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: BackHeader.jsx correctly uses useLocation().pathname.startsWith('/registrera-fagel') to hide the icon on the checkout page — clean and minimal change.
Icon markup (visual, testid, href, hover states) is intentionally identical to PublicHeader's version — good consistency.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9/9 asserted route behaviours pass; click-through navigation to /registrera-fagel verified)

test_credentials: admin: habib.nazary@hotmail.com / Jordgubbe234@u (only used to reach /mina-faglar which is auth-gated)

Fully verified across /galleri, /hittade-faglar, /rapportera-hittad, /rapportera-bortflygen, /mina-faglar (auth), /kontakt, /sidor/faq, / (home). Note: /mina-faglar redirects unauthenticated users to /login, so testing there requires login.

/registrera-fagel (BackHeader): icon correctly HIDDEN (count=0), back-header-label still present
/ (PublicHeader): icon still visible, href=/registrera-fagel — unchanged from iteration_12
